category_sources: Official README describes a command-line tool for code reviews stored inside git repositories as git objects.
source_facts.description says it is a distributed code review system for Git repos.
display_name_sources: Official repository and README use Git Appraise/git-appraise naming.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README includes overview, installation, and workflow documentation.
Official repository contains a docs directory for additional documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated as https://github.com/google/git-appraise; per instruction, repo returned as null and not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: Official README states the tool stores code reviews as git objects and is installed with Go tooling.
source_facts.description identifies distributed code review for Git repos.
